primary_question: Which KAG promotion, survival, rejection, review-latency, pattern-health, threshold, and noise pressures are declared for bounded candidate observation?
observation_rule: Compile declared KAG observation candidates only; symbolic review, memory, evaluation, recurrence, and retention inputs remain unbound and cannot be treated as observed evidence.

owner_truth_inputs.truth_scope: KAG candidate lifecycle, owner review, recurrence, and retention meaning
KAG-side promotion-candidate shape, review posture, and derived-substrate boundary
Memory evidence packages used by owner review
Bounded evaluation alignment and verdict evidence

authority_ceiling: The operation may expose candidate pressure declarations but cannot accept, reject, canonize, rank, promote, or establish source truth for KAG or Tree of Sophia material.
non_catalog_reason: The result declares candidate observation shapes and does not compute a catalog read model from bound KAG-owner evidence.
prohibited_inferences: Promotion pressure authorizes KAG acceptance or Tree of Sophia review.
A single event or high count proves pattern quality or recurrence.
Stats, eval, or memory surfaces replace owner review.
